vllm.title: Bump up transformers version in requirements.txt
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The new version of transformers is required for Code LLaMA and recent models.

vllm.title: Make `AsyncLLMEngine` more robust & fix batched abort
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR introduces a new abstraction in AsyncLLMEngine to ensure that requests are added and aborted correctly, and also fixes an issue with batched abort in scheduler that was causing some requests to not be cancelled correctly. Furthermore, it ensures that any exception is propagated to the user.

vllm.title: Enable safetensors loading for all models
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Added a new load_format argument for loading format. Please see the code comments for the details.
This PR has been tested on all supported models.

vllm.title: [FIX] Fix Alibi implementation in PagedAttention kernel
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
cc @Oliver-ss
Will verify and test the correctness.

vllm.title: faster startup of vLLM
vllm.author: ri938
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
issue
In production + using autoscaling the startup time of servers and vllm is very important to performance. Currently a lot of CPU work is being done on startup which can be done blazingly fast if done on the GPU instead
metrics
2 CPU environment
